hero.title: I *help* teams turn *ideas* into seamless digital experiences

about.intro: A developer who grows through *hands-on projects* and turns ideas into **real products**.
about.description: A *MERN stack-focused* mindset; building on both frontend and backend, learning through **direct experimentation**, and writing ***clean, maintainable code***.
about.full:
I'm a Computer Science student at IES Institute of Technology and Management, Bhopal, graduating in 2026 with a CGPA of 7.5. Over the past few years, I've been deeply invested in building real-world web applications — the kind that actually solve problems.

My core stack is MERN: MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, and Node.js. I enjoy working across the full stack — designing REST APIs, handling authentication flows, and building responsive frontends that feel great to use.

Some of the things I've built include a production-ready authentication API with JWT rotating tokens and Gmail OAuth2 OTP delivery, an Airbnb-inspired vacation rental platform with full CRUD, role-based access control, and Cloudinary image uploads, and a zero-dependency browser-based image editor using the HTML5 Canvas API with 9 real-time filters and 18 one-click presets.

Beyond web, I actively practice Data Structures and Algorithms in Java on LeetCode (100+ problems solved). I've also earned an Elite + Gold Certificate in Java Programming from IIT Kharagpur via NPTEL — awarded to the top 5% of participants nationwide.

Right now, I'm focused on deepening my backend knowledge — auth systems, database design, API architecture — and building projects that are genuinely useful and well-crafted.

projects.intro: A collection of *APIs*, *platforms*, and *tools* built with a focus on **real-world impact**.

items.title: Yt-Auth
items.description: A production-ready authentication REST API with 7 endpoints built using Node.js, Express 5, and MongoDB. Covers full user lifecycle — registration, OTP email verification, JWT login, and multi-device session management. Features rotating refresh tokens with SHA-256 hashing, httpOnly cookies to prevent XSS, and Gmail OAuth2 via Nodemailer with MongoDB TTL indexes for zero-maintenance OTP and session expiry.

items.title: Wanderlust
items.description: An Airbnb-inspired vacation rental platform with full CRUD for listings and reviews, built using Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB Atlas, and Bootstrap 5 with MVC architecture. Features user authentication and role-based authorization via Passport.js, Cloudinary image uploads with Multer, Joi schema validation, and a 5-star rating review system.

items.title: Image Filter Editor
items.description: A zero-dependency browser-based image editor using the HTML5 Canvas API, CSS3, and Vanilla JavaScript — no build tools or frameworks, resulting in sub-second load times. Features 9 real-time filter controls (brightness, contrast, saturation, blur, etc.), 18 one-click presets (Vintage, Cyberpunk, Noir, etc.), one-click PNG export, and full cross-browser compatibility.

roadmap.description: A timeline of my journey through computer science, from writing my first lines of code to shipping full-stack applications.

items.description: Started my B.Tech in Computer Science at IES Institute of Technology and Management, Bhopal. Got my first real exposure to programming fundamentals, OOP concepts, and Data Structures.
Dived into web development — learning HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Built my first static and dynamic websites. Started solving DSA problems on LeetCode to strengthen algorithmic thinking.

Went full-stack with the MERN stack. Built real projects — a production-ready Auth API, a vacation rental platform, and a browser-based image editor. Earned Elite + Gold certification in Java from IIT Kharagpur (NPTEL).

Deepened backend knowledge — JWT auth systems, REST API design, database optimization, and security best practices. Crossed 100+ DSA problems on LeetCode. Focused on building more scalable and production-grade applications.

Final year of B.Tech. Graduating in 2026. Actively seeking full-time opportunities in full-stack or backend development. Working on projects that demonstrate real-world architectural decisions and clean code standards.

contact.description: Open to full-time roles, internships, and interesting projects. Let's build something together.
